post_title: Teak Vanity Unit - The Timbak
post_content:
Teak Vanity Unit - The Timbak

The Timbak Louvered Teak Vanity Unit a gorgeous vanity unit for your bathroom. With a size of 90 x 55 x 75cm, this is designed to host any of our pebble basins or vessel sinks, including some of our largest models. Perfectly combining form and function, this unit is a beautiful addition to our range of wooden vanity units. Made from solid, 100% reclaimed teak with louvered sliding doors. Internally, there are 2 big cupboard spaces and internal drawers above. The Timbak Teak Vanity Unit does have an internal central recess for the pipework. Made from teak reclaimed from Indonesian buildings. Reclaimed Teak is previously used teak that comes from old buildings in Indonesia. Before the current knowledge and awareness of deforestation, all the buildings in Indonesia were built from teak. Modernisation in the far-eastern country has seen many of the old style wooden buildings replaced with brick and mortar. The original buildings were built more than 100 years ago from solid teak, and it is this wood that is recycled to make our beautiful vanity units. Reclaimed teak is a beautiful wood, is completely water resistant and is the ultimate choice for anything made for the bathroom. The Stone Sink Company supply ALL our vanity units UN-DRILLED with no waste hole. This allows the customer complete freedom to mount the sink where you wish. It is 30 seconds to drill a hole, yet once one is there then it is there forever- by supplying our stands un-drilled, we allow a blank canvas for perfect siting of your sink. We are also available to offer bespoke reclaimed teak units, although there is a wait for anything made to order. The Stone Sink Company offers a large selection of wooden vanity units. See here for all our other units. *FREE UK SHIPPING*  > info@thestonesinkcompany.com > 0800 0124294

post_title: Petrified Wood Sink No. 119 - 47 x 39 x 15cm
post_content: Petrified Wood Sink No. 119 - 47 x 39 x 15cm. A petrified wooden sink is one of those unique products that appears out of this world. The process leading to the creation of petrified wooden is magical. Indonesian petrified wood is actually stone from the Miocene era of time, this means it is circa 20 million years old. You did read that correctly - each sink is 20,000,000 years old!!! By comparison, the general estimate is that humans have been around for maybe 200,000 years. Petrified wood is an actual fossil. It forms when the wood is buried by sediment and protected from decay from oxygen. Minerals permeate the structure of the wood and slowly (over millions of years) replace the structure of the tree with stone. Petrified wood is extremely hard and durable. To work with requires specialist knowledge and skills - The Stone Sink Company produces the highest quality petrified wooden sinks. All sinks are unique due to being a natural product. Available in light or dark. All basins are solid stone and have a standard UK/Europe/US waste. post_title: Grey Stone Sink - Hewn Marble Rectangle. 50 x 40 x 12.5cm
post_content:
Grey Hewn Marble Rectangle Sink

A beautifully hewn rectangular stone sink, 50 × 40 × 12.5 cm. A striking balance of rugged natural texture and refined craftsmanship. Carved from a solid block of grey marble, the exterior surfaces are deliberately left with a hand-hewn finish, offering rustic charm. In contrast, the interior bowl is polished—creating an elegant, smooth basin that’s both functional and visually arresting. Our hewn rectangular sinks are incredibly eye catching.

Measuring 50 cm in length, 40 cm in width and 12.5 cm in height from countertop to rim, this rectangular sink offers a generous footprint suitable for a wide range of bathroom and washroom settings. The deep basin accommodates everyday use with ease, while the weighty, monolithic stone construction ensures durability and lasting impact. This is beautiful sink, which offers a stunning contrast compared to The Stone Sink Company’s fully polished rectangle sinks.

The natural grey marble brings subtle variations in tone and veining, meaning every piece is distinct—each with its own natural character and elegance. We also offer our Hewn Marble Rectangular Sinks in either cream or black, and offer full polished rectangular stone sinks in cream, grey or black marble.

All stone basins supplied by The Stone Sink Company are solid stone and have a standard UK/Europe/US waste hole (fitting not supplied). The Stone Sink Company offers a large selection of wooden vanity units to pair with this beautiful sink. post_title: Black Marble Sink - Hewn Rectangle 50 x 40 x 12.5cm
post_content:
Black Marble Sink - Hewn Rectangle

Black Marble Sink- hewn edges, rectangular with dimensions of 50 x 40 x 12.5cm.

Bring timeless elegance and bold sophistication to your bathroom or cloakroom with our Black Marble Sink. Handcrafted from a single block of beautiful black marble, this luxury basin showcases wonderful natural veining and a smooth polished interior that reflects understated opulence. The exterior is beautifully hewn giving a stunning feature. Similar sink available with a full polished exterior.

Each sink is completely unique, with rich dark, charcoal tones that make it a standout feature for traditional or modern bathrooms. The rectangular design offers a sleek, contemporary aesthetic while maximising usable wash space – ideal for compact spaces or minimalist styling.

Carved and honed with skill in our Indonesian workshop, this rectangular marble basin blends durability with beauty. See our 'About Us' page for more information on The Stone Sink Company.

Perfect as a countertop sink, this black marble basin is designed to sit atop a vanity unit or floating shelf, creating a bold focal point in any bathroom design. Pair it with a wall-mounted or tall mixer tap to complete the look.

This sink is sealed for water resistance and easy maintenance. Due to the organic nature of marble, slight variations in colour and pattern are to be expected – adding character and charm to every piece.

Upgrade your bathroom with the luxury and style of a handcrafted black marble bathroom sink – where natural beauty meets everyday functionality.

post_title: Wooden Bathroom Vanity Unit with Cupboards- The Susu.
post_content:
Wooden Bathroom Vanity Unit with Cupboards- The Susu.

This Reclaimed Wooden Bathroom Vanity Unit is a stylish vanity for your bathroom space. With dimensions of 75 x 50 x 75cm, The Susu combines a shelf, cupboards and a funky fresh design - this is perfect for one of our beautiful sinks. This Wooden Bathroom Vanity Unit will look perfect in any bathroom, modern or classic. Custom variations and sizes available. Heavyweight fully reclaimed teak from indigenous Indonesian buildings. Reclaimed Teak is previously used teak that comes from old buildings in Indonesia, and is what we use for all our wooden vanity units. Modernisation in the far-eastern country has seen many of the old style wooden buildings replaced with brick and mortar. The original buildings were built more than 100 years ago from solid teak, and it is this wood that is recycled to make our beautiful items. Reclaimed teak is a stunning wood and perfect for use in our units. Our sister business, Ombak Furniture, offers reclaimed teak furniture for the entire home! The Stone Sink Company supply ALL our wooden bathroom vanity units UN-DRILLED with no waste hole. This allows the customer complete freedom to mount the sink where you wish. It is 30 seconds to drill a hole, yet once one is there then it is there forever- by supplying our stands un-drilled, we allow a blank canvas for perfect siting of your sink. Please contact us if you have any more information on this. All our Reclaimed Wooden Bathroom Vanity Units are named after places on the stunning Indonesian island of Lombok, a place very close to our hearts at The Stone Sink Company! The Stone Sink Company offer a large selection of wooden vanity units. See here for all our other units. *FREE UK SHIPPING*  > info@thestonesinkcompany.com > 0800 0124294

post_title: Tall Teak Bathroom Cabinet
post_content:
Tall Teak Bathroom Cabinet - 40cm x 40cm x 200cm

Our Tall Teak Bathroom Cabinet perfectly compliments our wooden vanity units, or equally brings a touch of class to a bathroom even as a standalone unit. A beautiful, tall and sleek unit with stunning louvered doors. Offering useable storage with cupboards and drawers, this cabinet combines form and function. Our Tall Teak Bathroom Cabinet is made, as all our wooden items, from reclaimed teak. What is reclaimed teak? All our wooden items are made from reclaimed teak. Teak is a premium, rare, slow-growing hardwood. Famed for it's looks, durability and water resistance - teak has been used in house building, ships and across Indonesia and beyond as their resource. Nowadays, in modern times, deforestation is very much a thing so teak is not just felled. It either comes from managed plantations, or is reclaimed from previous uses. Reclaimed teak is so much better that plantation teak, the wood can be over 100 years old, and has incredible features that make every piece unique. If you love the reclaimed teak and the ethos behind it, we have a sister company called Ombak Furniture where we have reclaimed teak furniture for the entire home. We offer free UK shipping on ALL our items, including storage units and vanity units. We can and do ship our bigger items internationally, although this is done on a case by case basis due to the size and volume. *FREE UK SHIPPING*

post_title: Stone Sink. Natural Basin No. B1. L- 48cm, W- 39cm
post_content:
Stone Sink. Natural Basin No. B1. L- 48cm, W- 39cm, H- 15cm.

Natural Stone Sinks by The Stone Sink Company bring beautiful nature into your bathroom. Every sink is individually handcrafted from natural river boulders, making each piece completely unique in colour, shape and texture. Volcanic stones are harvested from the vast, geologically active rivers of Java, Indonesia and then carefully hollowed and polished to create these beautiful stone basins. The unique, natural exterior of these sinks is created by the effect of thousands of years of flowing water.

Our river stone sinks offer a beautiful balance between rustic and contemporary design, and will enhance any bathroom. The organic form feels like it has come straight from a flowing river. The natural exterior contrasts beautifully with the hand-polished interior, creating a beautiful statement piece to compliment any bathroom style. From modern minimalist spaces to earthy, spa-inspired bathrooms, our Natural Stone Sinks offer something unique to give the wow-factor, and a beautiful focal point.

A Natural Stone Sink - Key Features:

  • Every single one of our Natural Stone Sinks is unique.
  • We individually photograph and measure every stone basin- this is the exact sink that you will buy.
  • The dimensions are listed in the format: left-right, front-back. The dimensions are the maximum exterior dimensions, when viewed from above.
  • The height of all our Natural Sinks is 15cm, from countertop to rim.
  • The weight of our Natural Stone Sinks varies from approximately 25 - 35kg, depending on the sink.
  • Suitable for outdoor use.

Our Natural Stone Basins are incredibly durable. The volcanic, basaltic stone has properties similar to granite, making it perfect for either residential or commercial use. Please see our reviews / testimonials page to see how these sinks have been used in-situ, in every situation from a pub to being mounted in an old sewing machine in a home!

All stone bathroom sinks supplied by The Stone Sink Company are solid stone and have a standard UK/Europe/US waste hole (fitting not supplied). We offer a large selection of many stone bathroom sinks - marble, petrified wood, onyx and more. The Stone Sink Company offers a large selection of reclaimed wooden vanity units to pair with this beautiful sink. See here for all our units. *FREE UK SHIPPING / INTERNATIONAL AVAILABLE - Please contact* > info@thestonesinkcompany.com > 0800 0124294

post_title: Petrified Wood Sink No. 2 - 39 x 35cm
post_content:
Petrified Wood Sink – Handcrafted Fossilised Wood Basins

Petrified Wood Sink No.2 by The Stone Sink Company, 39 x 35cm. Bring ancient natural beauty into your bathroom. Each basin is handcrafted from solid petrified wood — a rare material formed when trees naturally fossilise over millions of years, petrified wood from Indonesia is circa 20 million years old! Minerals replace the wood structure, turning it into stone while preserving the original features of the tree. We then harvest the petrified wood, creating basins that are truly incredible.

Why Choose a Petrified Wood Sink?

  • Completely unique: No two petrified wood sinks are ever the same. Colours range from warm browns and honey tones to greys, blacks – the sizes, features and shape are all unique.
  • The ultimate statement piece: Petrified sinks are guaranteed to give you the wow-factor!
  • Durable and long-lasting: Petrified wood is as hard as quartz or granite, making these sinks ideal for everyday bathroom use. Picture a fossil being exposed on the beach after the surrounding stone erodes; fossils are harder wearing than normal stone.
  • Perfect for modern or natural-style bathrooms: Works beautifully in contemporary, minimalist, rustic or spa-inspired spaces. Petrified Wood Sinks are so unique, they can ‘pop’ and look superb in any style of bathroom.

Product Features

  • Each petrified wood sink sold by The Stone Sink Company is individually photographed and measured — you will receive the exact basin shown.
  • Measurements follow the format - left–right, front–back (maximum exterior dimensions when viewed from above).
  • Standard height: approximately 15cm from countertop to rim.
  • Weight: 25–35kg, depending on the specific fossilised piece.
  • Suitable for indoor installation.
  • Extremely strong and due to its mineral composition.
Every sink is made from solid petrified wood and includes a standard UK/Europe/US waste hole (waste fitting not supplied).

Premium Quality from The Stone Sink Company

Our petrified wood sinks are sourced from rural Indonesia, where some of the world’s finest fossilised wood is found. Each piece is carefully selected and expertly hand carved. We also offer a wide range of other stone sinks, including:
  • River stone sinks
  • Bowl basins
  • Marble sinks
If you want to pair your new basin with a vanity, The Stone Sink Company stocks a large range of reclaimed wooden vanity units that complement petrified wood sinks beautifully. *FREE UK SHIPPING / INTERNATIONAL AVAILABLE - Please contact* > info@thestonesinkcompany.com > 0800 0124294

post_title: Petrified Wood Sink No. 16 - 43 x 37cm
post_content:
Petrified Wood Sink – Handcrafted Fossilised Wood Basins

Petrified Wood Sink No.16 by The Stone Sink Company, 43 x 37cm. Bring ancient natural beauty into your bathroom. Each basin is handcrafted from solid petrified wood — a rare material formed when trees naturally fossilise over millions of years, petrified wood from Indonesia is circa 20 million years old! Minerals replace the wood structure, turning it into stone while preserving the original features of the tree. We then harvest the petrified wood, creating basins that are truly incredible.

Why Choose a Petrified Wood Sink?

  • Completely unique: No two petrified wood sinks are ever the same. Colours range from warm browns and honey tones to greys, blacks – the sizes, features and shape are all unique.
  • The ultimate statement piece: Petrified sinks are guaranteed to give you the wow-factor!
  • Durable and long-lasting: Petrified wood is as hard as quartz or granite, making these sinks ideal for everyday bathroom use. Picture a fossil being exposed on the beach after the surrounding stone erodes; fossils are harder wearing than normal stone.
  • Perfect for modern or natural-style bathrooms: Works beautifully in contemporary, minimalist, rustic or spa-inspired spaces. Petrified Wood Sinks are so unique, they can ‘pop’ and look superb in any style of bathroom.

Product Features

  • Each petrified wood sink sold by The Stone Sink Company is individually photographed and measured — you will receive the exact basin shown.
  • Measurements follow the format - left–right, front–back (maximum exterior dimensions when viewed from above).
  • Standard height: approximately 15cm from countertop to rim.
  • Weight: 25–35kg, depending on the specific fossilised piece.
  • Suitable for indoor installation.
  • Extremely strong and due to its mineral composition.
Every sink is made from solid petrified wood and includes a standard UK/Europe/US waste hole (waste fitting not supplied).

Premium Quality from The Stone Sink Company

Our petrified wood sinks are sourced from rural Indonesia, where some of the world’s finest fossilised wood is found. Each piece is carefully selected and expertly hand carved. We also offer a wide range of other stone sinks, including:
  • River stone sinks
  • Bowl basins
  • Marble sinks

post_title: Petrified Wood Sink No. 17 - 41 x 32cm
post_content:
Petrified Wood Sink – Handcrafted Fossilised Wood Basins

Petrified Wood Sink No.17 by The Stone Sink Company, 41 x 32cm. Bring ancient natural beauty into your bathroom. Each basin is handcrafted from solid petrified wood — a rare material formed when trees naturally fossilise over millions of years, petrified wood from Indonesia is circa 20 million years old! Minerals replace the wood structure, turning it into stone while preserving the original features of the tree. We then harvest the petrified wood, creating basins that are truly incredible.

Why Choose a Petrified Wood Sink?

  • Completely unique: No two petrified wood sinks are ever the same. Colours range from warm browns and honey tones to greys, blacks – the sizes, features and shape are all unique.
  • The ultimate statement piece: Petrified sinks are guaranteed to give you the wow-factor!
  • Durable and long-lasting: Petrified wood is as hard as quartz or granite, making these sinks ideal for everyday bathroom use. Picture a fossil being exposed on the beach after the surrounding stone erodes; fossils are harder wearing than normal stone.
  • Perfect for modern or natural-style bathrooms: Works beautifully in contemporary, minimalist, rustic or spa-inspired spaces. Petrified Wood Sinks are so unique, they can ‘pop’ and look superb in any style of bathroom.

Product Features

  • Each petrified wood sink sold by The Stone Sink Company is individually photographed and measured — you will receive the exact basin shown.
  • Measurements follow the format - left–right, front–back (maximum exterior dimensions when viewed from above).
  • Standard height: approximately 15cm from countertop to rim.
  • Weight: 25–35kg, depending on the specific fossilised piece.
  • Suitable for indoor installation.
  • Extremely strong and due to its mineral composition.
Every sink is made from solid petrified wood and includes a standard UK/Europe/US waste hole (waste fitting not supplied).

Premium Quality from The Stone Sink Company

Our petrified wood sinks are sourced from rural Indonesia, where some of the world’s finest fossilised wood is found. Each piece is carefully selected and expertly hand carved. We also offer a wide range of other stone sinks, including:
  • River stone sinks
  • Bowl basins
  • Marble sinks
If you want to pair your new basin with a vanity, The Stone Sink Company stocks a large range of reclaimed wooden vanity units that complement petrified wood sinks beautifully. *FREE UK SHIPPING / INTERNATIONAL AVAILABLE - Please contact* > info@thestonesinkcompany.com > 0800 0124294

post_title: Small Natural Stone Sink No. S30. L- 36cm, W- 35cm
post_content:
Small Natural Stone Sink. No. S30. L- 36cm, W- 35cm, H- 15cm.

Small Natural Stone Sinks- A stunning collection of smaller river stone sinks, offered by The Stone Sink Company. All our natural stone sinks, big and small, are hand worked from individual natural river stones, making each sink completely unique in shape, colour and texture. Individual stones are gathered from the large geologically active rivers of Java, Indonesia and then internally hollowed and polished to create these beautiful stone basins. The exterior remains natural, giving the beautiful organic look that makes these sinks so popular. Following customer requirements, The Stone Sink Company have bought this eclectic selection of smaller stone sinks to the market – perfect for where space is at a premium. Finished to the same beautiful standards as all our larger natural stone sinks. The natural exterior, rich in features, contrasts beautifully with the hand-polished interior, creating an item that proves a small sink can still be something special. From adding a touch of contrast to a modern space or being the focal point in a spa-inspired WC, our Small Natural Stone Sinks have the wow-factor. If you’re looking to see our full range of Natural Stone Sinks including some much larger sinks, please see our full range here.

Individual Natural Stone Sinks - Key Features:

  • Every single one of our Natural Stone Sinks is unique, ranging from small to large.
  • We individually photograph and measure every stone sink - this is the exact sink that you will buy.
  • The dimensions are listed in the format; left-right, front-back. The dimensions are the maximum exterior dimensions, when viewed from above.
  • The height of all our Natural Sinks is 15cm, from countertop to rim.
  • The weight of our Small Natural Stone Sinks varies from approximately 7 - 11 kg, depending on the sink.
  • Suitable for outdoor use if required.
  • Small Natural Stone Sinks photographed on a wooden vanity unit with dimensions of 50 x 50cm, if the perspective reference can help you visualise how this sink will look in your space.
  • Waste hole is suitable for a standard sized waste (not supplied). All our stone bathroom sinks have a 1 ¾ inch hole, which perfectly allows the fitment of a 1 ¼ inch diameter waste with a few mm either side. A 1 ¼ inch waste is standard across UK / EU / USA.
All our Natural Stone Basins are highly durable. The volcanic river stone has similar properties to granite making the sinks perfect for either residential or commercial use.
